0000000100001170	movk	x8, #0x9add, lsl #32

_apple_re_now_ns:
0000000100001254	sub	sp, sp, #0x20
0000000100001258	stp	x29, x30, [sp, #0x10]
000000010000125c	add	x29, sp, #0x10
0000000100001260	adrp	x8, 7 ; 0x100008000
0000000100001264	add	x8, x8, #0x10
0000000100001268	ldr	w8, [x8, #0x4]
000000010000126c	cbnz	w8, 0x100001284
0000000100001270	b	0x100001274
0000000100001274	adrp	x0, 7 ; 0x100008000

0000000100001280	b	0x100001284

000000010000128c	ldr	x8, [sp, #0x8]
0000000100001290	adrp	x10, 7 ; 0x100008000
0000000100001294	adrp	x9, 7 ; 0x100008000
0000000100001298	add	x9, x9, #0x10
